message:
chore: Remove fuzz/target/ build artifacts from tracking

Remove fuzzing target directory (5821 files) from version control.
Build artifacts should never have been committed. The existing
fuzz/target/ gitignore pattern prevents re-adding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
